/CAL: MATTER FORTHWITH FROM DEPARTMENT 11 TO JOIN 22001750/SAWD/DEF: CUSTODY STATUS ADDRESSED,/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALLBE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASEAS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMSWILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X: AS A CONDITION OF RELEASE THE DEFENDANT MUST ABIDE BY A CURFEW OF 9:00PMTO 6:00AM//X: THE PRELIMINARY HEARING DATE OF 03-21-22 IS CONFIRMED/

/CAL:ARRAIGNMENT/INTC/TEXT:CONFL CNSL APPTD/X:THE PUBLIC DEFENDER'S OFFICE DECLARES A CONFLICT,/CON:GEORGE LAZARUS/TEXT:DEFT ENT NG PLEA(S) & DENOF ALLEG/PD/FAWC/DEFTARR1/NTW60/LDPX:03-28-22/ACM/X:AS A CONDITION OFRELEASE, THE DEFENDANT SHALL BE PLACED ON PRE-TRIAL MONITORING BY THE SHERIFF'S OFFICE,/DEF:SHALL BE FITTED WITH A GPS DEVICE AND IS ORDERED TO COMPLY WITH ALL TERMS OF RELEASE AS SET FORTH ON THE RECORD AND BY THE SFSO/CTORD: SFSO COMMUNITY PROGRAMS WILL PLACE AN ELECTRONIC MONITORING DEVICE ON THE DEFENDANT PRIOR TO RELEASE FROM CUSTODY AND WILL PROVIDE ALL INSTRUCTIONS AT THAT TIME,/X:SEE SIGNED ORDER IN FILE,/SA2:7TH & MISSION ST, SF/SAORD3/SAORD/CONTD: TO SET PRELIMINARY HEARING IN DEPT, 9/DOP/
/CAL: PREHEARING CONFERENCE/FTA/OREVKD/BWI/BAIL:25000/X: NO CITE/X: 2 OF3 BENCH WARRANTS ISSUED THIS DATE /NIGHTSERV/
